content: I tried successfully to write a kernel module (call it M) in Rust. Now I want to export its functions for other kernel modules (call it T) to use. I understood that I need to generate the M.rmeta & M.o file from M and then use it to generate T.o file. However, I am trying to compile M.ko that would contain the exported functions in module M. How should I modify the Makefile (and which ones) in order to allow T.ko to recognize the exported functions provided by M?
